subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Draw me through Thy breezes in such wise that I may be set ablaze with Thy Name amidst all creation, that every soul may find warmth from me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب فاجذبنی من نفحاتک علی شأن اشتعل باسمک بین الأکوان لیجد کل نفس منی حرارة
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
